name: Unique product identifier (UPI)
description: This data element reports the ISO 4914 Unique product identifier of the transaction.
optionalityRules: Required for NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI transaction report Action types
Optional for TERM, EROR, PRTO transaction report Action types
valueRules: The UPI reported is a valid UPI Service code.
Reporting entities should obtain and report the UPI that has the same UPI asset class, instrument type, product and UPI attributes as the reportable transaction.
Where there is not an exact match, report the UPI that most closely matches the reportable transaction.

citations.document_name: ASIC Derivative Transaction Rules (Reporting) 2024—Schedule 1 technical guidance
